alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions and experience scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; background in leadership and team development within operations context
alignments.job_requirement: Lead and grow a team of FDE delivering production systems with frontier models

alignments.candidate_evidence: Owns end-to-end transformation program delivery through requirements, logic design, UAT, rollout, and production deployment; demonstrates coordinated stakeholder management and delivery execution at scale
alignments.job_requirement: Own end-to-end delivery outcomes through clarity, speed, tight coordination, and technical quality

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategic Operations and Product Operations background with direct cross-functional partnership with Product and Research teams on transformation initiatives
alignments.job_requirement: Translate field experience into sharp, actionable feedback for Product and Research

gaps.gap: Production software engineering and code review expertise. JD explicitly requires ability to 'write and review production-grade code across frontend and backend using Javascript or Python' as a core competency for an FDE manager role.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has basic Python (actively learning) and no production engineering background. FDE management at OpenAI requires hands-on technical credibility with code; this gap cannot be fully bridged through operational leadership alone, though team mentorship and rapid learning could help over time.

gaps.gap: Field Deployment Engineering (FDE) or forward-deployed customer-facing engineering team management. JD requires '2+ years managing high-performing FDE or customer-facing engineers' as a stated criterion.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate background is in Strategy/Operations transformation and commercial scaling, not FDE or technical field deployment. While stakeholder management and delivery discipline transfer, the specialized domain of engineering-led customer deployment is not demonstrated.

gaps.gap: Deep technical foundation in frontier model deployment and production systems. FDE roles operate 'at the intersection of customer delivery and core platform development' requiring hands-on architecture, debugging, and technical troubleshooting of LLM systems.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's AI transformation experience is business-problem and process-focused, not deep technical platform work. Onboarding curve would be steep and require significant mentorship from Research and Product.

gaps.gap: Hands-on project leadership from prototype through production in a software/ML engineering context. JD states 'led high-pressure technical projects from prototype to production'—candidate's projects are transformation and commercial operations, not technical system builds.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate demonstrates program leadership and high-pressure delivery in non-technical domain. Technical project leadership would require foundational ramp on OpenAI's platform and deployment tooling.

hard_blockers.evidence: JD states 'Write and review production-grade code across frontend and backend using Javascript or Python' as a core responsibility for FDE manager. Candidate profile documents 'No production software-engineering background' and 'Python basic and actively learning.' This is a production engineering requirement, not a nice-to-have or preferred skill. For an FDE manager at a tier-1 AI company, inability to review and write production code is disqualifying.

output.summary: Manager, Forward Deployed Engineering at OpenAI is a highly technical leadership role requiring hands-on production software engineering expertise and 2+ years managing FDE teams. Candidate brings eight years of Strategy/Operations leadership, transformation program delivery, and stakeholder management—strong for *implementation-heavy* business roles—but lacks the disqualifying production code expertise, FDE team management background, and deep technical foundation required for this specialist engineering-led deployment role. Strong operations leader, wrong technical specialization.
uncertainties: Extent of candidate's exposure to LLM deployment systems and frontier AI products beyond business transformation framing
Depth of stakeholder and technical coordination skills when partnering directly with Research and Product on core platform decisions
Feasibility of rapid upskilling in production software engineering given candidate's current Python level and engineering background gap
Whether hybrid work model and London location create relocation or visa complications
